title: Find a Common Denominator
text: Combine the two fractions in the numerator before working with the outer denominator.

title: Factor Out the Negative
text: Once the numerator is simplified, use $$4-x=-(x-4)$$ to cancel the matching factor.

title: Combine the Inner Fractions
text: What single fraction is equivalent to $$\frac{1}{x-1}-\frac{1}{3}$$?
